title: geum ciliatum
intro: Geum ciliatum, also known as the prairie avens, is a perennial wildflower native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Geum ciliatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Geum ciliatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically in creams and salves to promote wound healing and reduce skin irritations.
